channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 9 bedford square, 12th March
item.description:
Broken/rocking manhole cover danger to road users

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bedford Square, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bedford Square outside no 9, 12th March
item.description:
Manhole covers fail
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bedford Square, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike with no front forks locked in bike rack?, 12th March
item.description:
The. bike has had its front forks removed from frame. It is locked to the bike rack in the bus station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North End Road, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter in street, 12th March
item.description:
Street not been cleaned for days - please litter pick, sweep up leave etc and take all rubbish out of flowerbeds. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins not emptied in 3 days, 12th March
item.description:
Please empty litter bins and clean the street - not been done in days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped waste outside flat 8 again, 12th March
item.description:
Constant fly tipping outside flat 8

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Median Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Opposite 10, 12th March
item.description:
Broken metal bollards laying across footway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamestown Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on Old Mill Road, 12th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on pavement outside homes on Old Mill Home, and opposite on the common. There's a handy name and address on one of the boxes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Mill Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip carpet rubble etc, 12th March
item.description:
Pls remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Midfield Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: About for 4 large pot holes down this road at different points, 12th March
item.description:
About 4 big pot holes with stones now flying when cars speeding down the road, cars also swerving to avoid them and a bus route and two schools on same road very dangerous and an accident waiting to happen.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rangefield Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Items Dumped, 12th March
item.description:
A bucket, large lampshade, rubbish bags, and what looks like a small motor have been left on the pavement next to the railway line.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tyler Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Crouch Hill, 12th March
item.description:
Rubbish left on Crouch Hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkland Walk, Finsbury Park, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping of domestic rubbish Dickenson Road, 12th March
item.description:
Bulky household waste left outside a residence on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Dickenson Road, Crouch End, Greater London

item.title: Once again, more rubbish, 12th March
item.description:
As per the photo it started off with one bag and it’s now escalated into a flight tip free for all social media

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 201/203, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular litter dumped at the top of Farjeon Road opposite lido, 12th March
item.description:
Household food waste /Rubbish dumped each week on the road in small carrier bags
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merriman Road, Kidbrooke
